ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer (M for male, F for female) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer's address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was last updated */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer's loyalty program */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points earned by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_loyalty_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("loyalty_program_id") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer resides */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer resides */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer's address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the customer resides */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the address record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the address record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the purchase */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the purchase */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_payment_method FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_order_status FOREIGN KEY ("order_status") REFERENCES order_status ("order_status"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer whose preferences are stored */,
  "preference_type" TEXT /* Type of preference (e.g., email marketing, SMS marketing) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference (e.g., true, false, specific settings) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the loyalty program record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the loyalty program record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "order_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Name of the order status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the order status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order status record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order status record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment method record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment method record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer_service) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
